source_jobs.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the Infra Platform team, the backbone of everything engineering at Vibe. We own hosting, provisioning, observability, CI/CD, internal tooling, security, and compliance. Every product and platform team runs on what we build.

You’ll report to our Lead Platform Engineer, and together with the team, you’ll help shape the technical direction and uphold the infrastructure standards the whole company relies on.

This role exists because our platform is growing fast, and more than 60 engineers depend on it every day. We’re looking for someone who can take on real ownership and help shape how it scales. You’ll work on infrastructure handling more than 600k QPS, latency targets under 10ms, and over 5 PB of storage. Just as importantly, you’ll be someone other engineers turn to when the hard problems show up, which gives this role real influence across the company.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Keep the platform running at scale

 - Own reliability across hosting, provisioning, network, and compute, targeting 99.99% uptime

 - Proactively maintain infrastructure, track drift, and lead migrations before they become incidents

 - Respond to production issues quickly, communicate clearly, and fix root causes for lasting improvements.

Build and evolve cloud infrastructure

 - Design and implement core infra components that scale to the next orders of magnitude

 - Make smart build-vs-buy calls and evolve systems as business needs shift

 - Manage infrastructure as code across different providers

Improve developer experience across the org

 - Make it easier for engineering teams to move fast

 - Build shared tooling: internal CLIs, shared libraries, automation scripts in Go or Python

 - Partner with dev teams to help them ship faster without creating technical debt

Support ML infrastructure and build real-time streaming systems

 - Support the infrastructure behind frequent model retraining on large datasets

 - Help improve compute efficiency and model serving performance to meet inference latency targets

 - Build, scale, and `operate the real-time streaming platform

Champion security with exposure to compliance requirements

 - Enforce best practices around permissions, secret handling, and network security

 - Support SOC2 compliance work and embed secur

source_jobs.title: AI Lead  Developer Experience
source_jobs.description:
LEAD DEVEX




ABOUT VIBE

At http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play — it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement — giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join our Engineering team, which owns the full technical stack powering Vibe's streaming TV advertising platform — from bidding infrastructure to data pipelines and the product engineers ship every day.

This role exists because we're making an AI-first bet on how engineers work. We believe the best engineering teams in the next year won't just use AI tools — they'll be built around them. We need someone to lead that shift at Vibe, and get there before anyone else does.

Three reasons a great candidate should care:

 - Greenfield ownership. This is a new role. You'll define what developer experience means at Vibe — the tooling, the workflow, the culture around it.

 - Real impact, fast. Every engineer at Vibe uses what you build. You'll feel the effect of your work within weeks, not quarters.

 - A front-row seat to the product. You'll work closely with the product team, with direct visibility into how engineering decisions shape what Vibe ships.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Set the AI-first engineering standard

 - Define and roll out Vibe's AI-assisted development strategy across the engineering org

 - Own adoption of coding agents and AI tooling — Claude Code, Cursor, MCP — and drive measurable gains in engineering velocity

 - Identify where AI can remove friction and run experiments to prove it

 - Live at the bleeding edge of the AI tooling landscape, explore emerging best practices in this fast evolving space, and evangelize them internally

Own the developer tooling stack

 - Maintain and evolve Vibe's core developer tooling across GitHub, CI/CD, and local dev environments

 - Reduce time-to-first-commit for new engineers and time-to-ship for the whole team

 - Keep the stack lean — cut tools that don't pull their weight

 - Own the AI-centric golden path for Vibe’s software development lifecycle

Raise the security bar

 - Own security tooling and best practices across the engineering org

 - Embed security into the development workflow without slowing engineers down

 - Spot risks early and drive remediation before they become incidents

Measure and improve engineering efficiency

 - Define the metrics that matter for developer experience — and track them

 - Report on velocity, to

source_jobs.title: Principal Data Engineer - Governance & Compliance
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, http://vibe.co/Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You’ll operate as an embedded subject-matter expert within the Engineering organization, reporting high into Engineering and partnering closely with Data Platform, Analytics, Product and Legal teams.

You will sit at the intersection of data platform engineering, governance, and compliance, helping Vibe make its data assets easier to understand, safer to use, and ready to scale with premium publishers and enterprise advertisers.

This role exists because data is central to everything we do at Vibe. As the company grows, we need to move from startup-speed data practices to a more structured, trusted, and compliant data foundation, without slowing down product and engineering velocity.

3 reasons a great candidate should care:

 - You’ll shape a critical foundation.
   Data powers Vibe’s product, reporting, optimization, ML systems, and partner integrations. You’ll help define how that data is governed, accessed, trusted, and used.

 - The timing is right.
   We’re at the point where informal processes are no longer enough. You’ll join before the patterns are fully set and help build the right foundations from the ground up.

 - You’ll have real ownership.
   This is a senior IC role with strong influence across Engineering. You’ll have the mandate to identify gaps, define the roadmap, and implement practical governance and compliance standards that actually work.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Data governance & discoverability

 - Build a clear understanding of Vibe’s key data flows, sources of truth, and ownership.

 - Help define schemas, data contracts, documentation, and standards for how data should be used across the company.

 - Improve data discoverability so teams can confidently understand what data exists, where it lives, and how to use it.

 - Establish practical standards around data quality, lineage, observability, and ownership.

 - Define, maintain and enforce data lifecycle policies

 - Help teams track data cost and usage

Data compliance & privacy

 - Define and implement data compliance practices aligned with Vibe’s business, partners, and regulatory needs.

 - Partner with Legal, Product, Security, and Engineering to assess the impact of new data sources, partnerships, and use cases.

 - Help clarify

source_jobs.title: GTM Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the GTM Operations team sitting at the intersection of GTM strategy and technical execution — identifying problems across the revenue funnel and building the solutions to fix them. This isn't a Salesforce admin role or a reporting function; it's an end-to-end builder role, embedded closely with Sales and Customer Success, translating what's breaking in the business into AI-first tools and automations that actually ship. The GTM org is growing fast, and this role exists to make sure the operational infrastructure grows with it. Three reasons to want this: direct ownership over problems that connect to real revenue outcomes, more scope and fewer layers than you'd find anywhere else at this revenue scale, and the chance to shape what a modern, AI-native GTM Ops function looks like from the ground up.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Diagnose and prioritize

 - Map problems across the full revenue funnel — lead routing, pipeline execution, retention, and growth

 - Triage daily asks from the sales team while managing longer-term roadmap projects in parallel

 - Form a clear, defended POV on what to build first and why it matters to the business

Build and ship

 - Build tools using Claude, AI agents, and automation — solutions should be agent-led, not workflow-dependent

 - Contribute features to tools owned by the engineering team, working directly alongside them

 - Test automations, resolve technical issues, and iterate based on what the data shows

Embed with GTM teams

 - Meet regularly with Sales and CS teams to surface emerging needs as strategy evolves

 - Translate those needs into a prioritized backlog and work through it systematically

 - Know when a process should stay team-specific vs. when it needs to align with global systems — and bring teams along when it's the latter

Drive toward outcomes

 - Tie every project to a revenue or net dollar retention goal

 - Move from shipping to driving by month 12 — set a goal, map the work, show the correlation

 - Maintain clean, comparable data across the GTM org by building alignment on systems and reporting


WHAT YOU NEED

 - 5–7+ years in GTM Operations, Revenue Operations, or GTM Product/Program Management

 - Demonstrated systems thinking — you connect tools, teams, and workflows into something

source_jobs.title: Staff Backend Software Engineer - Performance
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the Performance team the engineers who own advertiser outcomes at Vibe. Bidding, pacing, and the prediction stack that drives both. You'll report to Clément Schiano, Engineering Manager for Performance.

This role exists because our roadmap is clear and the bottleneck is execution. We have a knowledge concentration problem too: critical expertise sits with one person, which creates fragility. We need someone who can absorb, challenge, and extend that knowledge not just ship tickets.

Three reasons someone great would want this job:

 1. CTV performance advertising is still being invented. The auction dynamics, identity graph, and feedback loops are nothing like display or search. There's no playbook to copy you'd be writing it.

 2. You own the full decision loop. From prediction to bid price to pacing, on a product real advertisers depend on today. Your judgment shapes the direction. You'll see the impact in the numbers within weeks.

 3. The timing is right. Past "does this work?" and into "how fast can we scale this?" Early enough to shape the architecture. Late enough that you're not building on sand.
    
    


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Own the pacer and bidder

 - Go deep on the bidder and pacer stack map it end-to-end and identify at least one fragility worth owning on day one

 - Propose improvements to the bidder or pacer autonomously from problem definition through to design proposal

 - Ship measurable improvements to CPx, pacing accuracy, or win rate within your first three months

Raise the team's ceiling

 - Distribute critical system knowledge: make the team faster and less dependent on any single person

 - Challenge existing designs, including inherited ones, and push for cleaner solutions

 - Deepen expertise in the theoretical foundations (probabilistic modelling, PID control theory) powering our approaches

Move at Vibe pace

 - Use AI tooling as a genuine force multiplier (not a crutch, not a checkbox)

 - Iterate in production, not in your head, we - ship, measure and adjust
   
   


WHAT YOU NEED

 - Shipped backend systems in a strongly typed language C++, Rust, Go, Scala, Java, or equivalent at production scale

 - Debugged distributed systems under real traffic: latency issues, consistency failures, the works

 - Worked i

source_jobs.title: GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join Vibe's Growth team and own the internal platform that powers our GTM operations — reporting to the Director of GTM Systems. This role exists because we're scaling a model where cross-functional contributors across the business all push code into the same platform, and we need a second technical owner to share the review load, protect quality, and keep velocity high. About half your time is maintenance and management: reviewing PRs, making sure contributions are safe, secure, and production-ready. The other half is yours — identifying business problems worth solving and building features end-to-end, from scoping to shipping to adoption. If you want real ownership, a direct line from idea to production, and work that touches every part of how the company operates, this is it.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Code Review & Quality

 - Review PRs from cross-functional contributors — validate logic, security, and production-readiness

 - Maintain and improve the GTM platform codebase as the team and contributor count grow

 - Enable non-engineer contributors to ship safely — support their work without gatekeeping it

Feature Development

 - Identify business problems worth solving and build features end-to-end

 - Integrate external APIs and enrichment providers directly into the application

 - Own tooling enablement — build it, test it, and make sure others can use it as intended

Infrastructure & Operations

 - Manage deployments, servers, and infrastructure for the GTM platform

 - Maintain code quality standards, documentation, and contributor patterns across the stack
   
   


WHAT YOU NEED

 - 3+ years of full-stack software engineering experience, including front-end

 - Fluency across a modern web stack: JavaScript/TypeScript, React/Next.js, Postgres, Docker, AWS, Prisma, and API integrations

 - Experience contributing to and reviewing code in a multi-person codebase — you understand PR reviews, merge conflicts, and sequencing changes across contributors

 - A track record of owning features end-to-end: picking the problem, building the solution, and driving adoption without a spec handed to you

 - DevOps comfort — servers, deploys, and infra are part of your day, not a hand-off

 - Daily use of AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, or similar)

source_jobs.title: Director of Sales Enablement
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play — it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement — giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll be the first Director of Sales Enablement at Vibe — joining a GTM org that's already moved fast and now needs to move smarter. You'll report directly to the CRO and own the full enablement function: how we onboard, how we coach, how we train, and how we make sure every rep on the floor can sell Vibe the way it deserves to be sold.

The GTM org is already moving — now it needs a strategy that scales with it. You'll come in with real infrastructure behind you and a mandate to set the direction, raise the bar, and build something that compounds. This role exists because we've scaled revenue to nine figures, built proprietary AI infrastructure most companies our size don't have, and now need someone to turn all of it into a systematic, measurable program that raises the ceiling for every seller on the floor. The tools are here. The team is moving. What's missing is the architect. Three reasons someone great would want this job: you'll set the strategy for a function that directly touches every revenue-generating role in the company, you'll shape how one of the fastest-growing companies in streaming TV advertising develops and scales its commercial talent, and you'll sit at the intersection of AI, product, and GTM in a market that's moving faster than almost anything else in media.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build the Enablement Foundation

 - Design and own the GTM enablement strategy — from new hire onboarding through advanced skill development

 - Define what "great" looks like at each stage of the sales motion and build programs to close the gap

 - Build a structured onboarding program that gets new reps to full productivity faster than industry benchmarks

Build With AI, Not Around It

 - Deploy AI agents and automation to deliver personalized coaching, onboarding, and deal support at a scale no human-only program could match

 - Use call intelligence and pipeline data to identify where reps lose deals and design targeted interventions that move the number

 - Build agentic workflows that give sellers on-demand access to deal context, competitive intel, and coaching — without waiting on a human to deliver it

 - Stay ahead of what's possible and bring new tools into the workflow before the rest of the market catches up

Coach and Develop the Team

source_jobs.title: Fullstack Engineer - AdManager (Freelance)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the AdManager team, the team behind Vibe's client-facing advertiser experience. The team helps advertisers set up campaigns, understand performance, manage creatives, connect tools and data sources, handle payments, and manage their investment through a seamless, reliable interface.

This freelance role exists because AdManager's scope is growing fast, and we need senior engineering capacity to keep shipping complex advertiser-facing initiatives without lowering the bar on product quality, reliability, and maintainability. This is not a narrow execution role. You'll own meaningful work end-to-end: from problem definition, technical design, dependency management, and development through rollout, monitoring, production follow-up, and continuous improvement.

3 reasons to want this role:

 - You'll work on a high-impact product surface used directly by advertisers

 - You'll collaborate with a strong engineering and product team operating with high ownership and low process friction

 - You'll work in an AI-forward environment where speed, technical excellence, and product judgment are expected to reinforce each other.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build & Ship Advertiser-Facing Product

 - Design, build, and evolve core AdManager features across campaign setup, reporting, onboarding, creatives management, payments, account management, and AI-powered workflows

 - Own complex initiatives from conception to production with minimal supervision

 - Translate ambiguous product needs into clear technical plans, milestones, and production-ready features

 - Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver high-quality advertiser experiences

Fullstack Engineering

 - Build and maintain robust user-facing experiences using Next.js, React and Typescript

 - Design scalable APIs, services, database schemas, and domain models that remain maintainable as the platform grows

 - Work with PostgreSQL and backend systems to support reliable advertiser workflows and reporting experiences

 - Apply strong engineering practices, including testing, clear architecture, and thoughtful code reviews

Reliability & Production Ownership

 - Ship features with appropriate monitoring, logging, alerting, analytics, and observability

 - I

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative, Apps & Gaming
source_jobs.description:
About Vibe

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.



About the Role

You'll join our Sales team as an SDR focused on the Apps & Gaming vertical, owning the top of pipeline and partnering directly with Account Executives to open new business. We're looking for someone who is genuinely fluent in AI — not just familiar with it — and uses it to prospect smarter, personalize at scale, and spend less time on the manual work that slows most SDRs down.

This is the right role if you're curious, structured, and motivated by what you can earn. You'll have clear goals, real feedback loops, and real upside at one of the fastest-growing companies in streaming TV advertising.



What You'll Do

Outbound Execution

 - Build and run high-frequency outbound sequences across email, LinkedIn, and phone with daily consistency

 - Craft personalized messaging that reflects each prospect's business context — not a template blast

 - Keep Salesforce and Outreach records clean with zero overdue tasks, every day

AI-Powered Prospecting

 - Use AI tools to automate research, personalization, and sequencing — and actively look for new ways to apply them

 - Stay current on the evolving AI sales toolset and bring new approaches to the team without being asked

 - Replace manual workflows with smarter systems wherever possible

Pipeline & Qualification

 - Identify and prioritize target accounts in the Apps & Gaming space based on ICP

 - Qualify opportunities with a genuine problem match before handing off to AEs

 - Map buying committees and ensure clean, well-contextualized AE handoffs

Collaboration & Presence

 - Partner with AEs on account strategy, messaging, and follow-up coordination

 - Travel to industry events and conferences to build relationships and generate pipeline in person

 - Share what's working — reply rates, conversion trends, messaging learnings — with the broader team

What You Need

 - 1–3 years of outbound SDR or BDR experience supporting US markets

 - Willingness and ability to travel for industry conferences and events

 - Demonstrated use of AI tools to improve outreach quality, efficiency, or personalization

 - Proficiency with Salesforce, Outreach, and Sales Navigator

 - A track record of booking quality meetings that convert — not just volume

 - Strong written and verbal communication — you can hold a real conve

source_jobs.title: Senior Strategic Operator
source_jobs.description:
About Vibe

At http://vibe.coVibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play -- it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, http://vibe.coVibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, http://vibe.coVibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.

About the Role

You'll join the Strategic Initiatives team -- a newly built function that sits at the intersection of founder vision and company execution. The team owns three things: company governance, cross-functional initiative monitoring, and zero-to-one special projects. You'll report directly to the VP of Strategic Initiatives.

This role exists because Vibe is moving fast and the complexity of running the company at scale demands sharper infrastructure. Three reasons someone great would want this job: you'll work directly with the leadership on the most consequential decisions in the company; you'll help build a function from scratch -- setting the playbook, not just following it; and you'll use AI not as a feature to mention in a resume, but as a real force multiplier you design, build, and deploy yourself.

What You'll Do

Special Projects & Strategic Research

 - Own market entry assessments, new business model explorations, and M&A workstreams end-to-end -- from zero to shipped.

 - Build analytical frameworks from first principles and deliver sharp recommendations in days, not weeks.

 - Use AI to compress research cycles and surface insights faster than traditional methods allow.

 - Translate ambiguous mandates into decision-ready materials for the VP of Strategic Initiatives, CEO, and leadership.

Initiative Monitoring

 - Own the tracking system for Vibe's most critical cross-functional initiatives, covering milestones, KPIs, owners, and blockers.

 - Synthesize initiative health into clear briefs for the VP of Strategic Initiatives -- risks identified, options laid out, recommendation drafted.

Governance & AI Automation

 - Own the analytical backbone of Business Reviews and ExCo meetings in collaboration with Finance -- every forum focused, prepared, and decision-producing.

 - Design and deploy AI agents to automate governance workflows: pre-read generation, initiative tracking, and action item follow-up.

 - Identify where AI can eliminate manual overhead in the governance system and own the build end-to-end.

Building the Function

 - Co-design how the Strategic Initiatives team operates, what it prioritizes, and how it scales as Vibe grows.

 - Bring structure where none exists and push toward what a wo

source_jobs.title: Supply Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement — giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.

 
 


ABOUT THE ROLE

You're joining the Supply team at the foundation stage as one of the first operational hires on a team being built from scratch. You'll own the operational core of how Vibe's supply function runs: deal management, inventory quality, SSP relationships, creative compliance, and cross-team coordination. Three reasons to want this: you'll work on capabilities that don't exist elsewhere in the market; your work directly shapes our publisher development roadmap as it's being built; and this role is explicitly designed to evolve to stay at the forefront of innovation. Vibe’s operational layer will be increasingly automated, and we want to find someone who sees that as an opportunity to grow with us as we scale.

 
 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Deal Management

 - Own the full deal lifecycle from new deal setup and spend monitoring to deals management across all our active publisher relationships

 - Troubleshoot delivery issues end-to-end, digging until you find the answer

 - Execute auction-level optimization and monitoring, using SQL to surface delivery patterns and anomalies

SSP Management & Inventory Control

 - Own inventory quality control, identifying and resolving issues before they impact campaign performance

 - Run key metrics reporting and volume-matching queries that keep publisher and internal teams in sync

Creative Compliance

 - Manage creative compliance processes, ensuring our publisher inventory meets publisher standards

 - Coordinate with internal teams to resolve compliance issues quickly and systematically

Cross-Team Coordination

 - Serve as the primary point of contact for CSM and Account Management on questions related to our inventory

 - Manage the Supply triage incoming requests from across the organization

 - Build internal enablement materials so other teams can self-serve on supply questions over time

 - Partner with engineers on automation initiatives to incorporate the use of AI

 
 


WHAT YOU NEED

 - 3–5+ years in programmatic advertising, with hands-on experience across the DSP/SSP ecosystem

 - Strong SQL skills. You can run your own queries, build your own analyses, and don't need to wait for a data team

 - Proven experience managing relationships with large publishers or media organizations. You understand their org

ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the Customer Success team as a Senior Customer Success Manager, owning the end-to-end relationship with Vibe's fastest-growing enterprise advertisers. This role sits at the intersection of retention, expansion, and product influence — you're not just managing accounts, you're building the partnerships that define what great looks like in streaming TV advertising. We're scaling our enterprise business aggressively in 2026, and we need someone who can carry a book of business with both strategic depth and operational precision. Three reasons to want this: real ownership over revenue outcomes, a direct line into how the product evolves, and front-row access to a category being built in real time.

 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Own the Customer Relationship

 - Manage the full client lifecycle — from campaign launch through optimization — for a portfolio of enterprise accounts

 - Build deep, trust-based relationships by proactively surfacing insights, best practices, and strategic recommendations

 - Serve as the primary point of contact, ensuring clients are consistently deriving measurable value from the platform

Drive Revenue Outcomes

 - Own renewal and expansion targets across your book of business

 - Identify and pursue upsell and cross-sell opportunities through a deep understanding of each client's goals

 - Forecast account health accurately and act early on risk signals

Deliver Campaign Excellence

 - Guide clients through campaign strategy, execution, and performance optimization on the Vibe platform

 - Contextualize platform results within a broader multi-channel strategy, including incrementality measurement and ROAS framing

 - Translate performance data into clear, actionable recommendations that clients can act on immediately

Be the Voice of the Customer

 - Bring customer feedback and unmet needs directly into product and roadmap conversations

 - Partner with Sales, Product, and Analytics to resolve challenges and improve the platform experience

 - Represent the customer perspective in internal decisions without losing sight of business priorities

 


WHAT YOU NEED

 - 5+ years managing mid-market or enterprise accounts on a digital advertising platform — streaming TV, paid social, search, or similar

 - Proven track record of

source_jobs.title: People AI Operations Lead
source_jobs.description:

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.



ABOUT THE ROLE

AI is reshaping how operating teams work, but most of that value stays locked behind two walls: people don't know what's possible, and AI experts at the center try to solve problems from too far away. You'll join the People function as a senior individual contributor, reporting directly to Nicholas https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicholasstephenwagner/, Chief People Officer, with high visibility across the executive team. This role exists to break through both walls from the inside, building the agents, automations, and internal apps that let Vibe operate at a different tempo. You'll build where the leverage is real, automating the workflows that run recruiting, onboarding, performance, and HR operations. You'll be both builder and multiplier, shipping tools yourself and teaching others to build their own. And you'll shape how Vibe works with AI, defining what's responsible, sanctioned, and safe across the company.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build AI agents, automations, and internal tools

 - Ship production agents and automations for People workflows like recruiting, onboarding, and mobility

 - Observe real processes to find where automation creates immediate leverage

 - Deploy with n8n, Claude Code, Notion AI, and the broader stack

 - Measure, test, and improve every tool you put into production

Lead AI enablement across the company

 - Organize Vibe's internal AI Champions program end to end

 - Identify 1–2 power users to leverage per team and equip them with a playbook

 - Organize the community through office hours, brown bags, and hands-on sessions

 - Teach recruiters, office managers, and HR teammates to build their first agent in one sitting

Partner with Engineering on the infrastructure layer

 - Build the data access, MCP servers, and governance that make safe building possible

 - Translate People and Operations needs into clear technical requirements

 - Ensure systems stay secure, scalable, and maintainable

Define responsible People AI usage

 - Set clear standards for data classification, approved tools, and internal workflows

 - Clarify what data can be used where, and what stays in approved environments

 - Build guardrails with Legal, Infra, and Engineering that protect trust and privacy

Own adoption and impact

 - Measure adoption, tim

source_jobs.title: Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Vibe

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Data isn't a support function at Vibe. It's the machinery. Every decision (which ad, which household, which moment) runs on it. You'll join the Data Platform team, which owns the company's entire data backbone: the storage layer holding several petabytes, the batch systems that feed Product, Sales, Finance, and ML, the real-time streams behind spend tracking and retargeting, and the ClickHouse and Cube reporting stack that serves sub-second analytics to advertisers inside the Clear platform.

This role exists because we have real scaling problems (500k+ messages per second, petabytes stored, both growing) and we need engineers who can build the infrastructure to stay ahead of them. Three reasons to want this: you'll own projects end-to-end, from stakeholder requirements through schema, build, monitoring, and iteration; you'll work on genuine big-data scaling problems, not maintenance; and you'll have direct, measurable impact on the business, because here data is a first-class citizen.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Ship and operate production pipelines across batch, streaming, and reporting stacks, from requirements to monitoring

 - Design storage and compute for petabyte-scale datasets using Iceberg, Spark, DuckDB, and Trino

 - Cut cost and latency on specific pipelines and queries, with quantified, instrumented impact

 - Own the data contract for the ClickHouse and Cube reporting stack behind the Clear UI

 - Build alerts, SLOs, and runbooks so fewer incidents reach users

 - Lead incident response and carry on-call across production systems

 - Influence upstream producers on schemas, semantics, and SLAs for bid, win, and impression events

 - Build tooling, conventions, and data contracts that make the whole team faster
   
   


WHAT YOU NEED

 - 5+ years building and operating production data platforms at real volume, not analytics or BI-adjacent work.

 - Deep lakehouse experience across storage (Iceberg, Delta, or Hudi) and compute (Spark, DuckDB, or Trino)

 - Production experience with a modern orchestrator (Dagster, Airflow, or Prefect) plus dbt or an equivalent transformation framework

 - A proven track record of handling large volumes of data under time and cost constraints.

 - Operational ownership: on-call, incident response, alerts and runbooks you actually wrote

 - Cross-functional communication: you adapt detail to the audience and push back on stakeholders constructively
   


NICE TO HAVES

 - A column-store analytics engine in production: ClickHouse ideally, or Druid, Pinot, or BigQuery at serious scale

 - Batch and streaming together: Kafka, Kinesis, or Flink feeding a serving layer, not just nightly batch

 - The exact stack

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer, Integrations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBE

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll join the Integrations team, the connective tissue of Vibe's platform, reporting directly to the Engineering Manager. The team owns all data flowing in and out of Vibe: measurement and attribution integrations, audience connections from CRMs and CDPs, and reporting pipelines. This role exists because we're building a first-class Developer Platform, opening Vibe's full capabilities as an API so external partners can build on top of us. Three reasons to want this: you'll be a senior voice on a team that operates at the center of Vibe's growth, you'll own foundational architecture decisions on a platform that marquee partners like Clay are already building against, and you'll work in an environment where AI-augmented development is the expectation, not the experiment.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build and Ship Integrations

 - Design and implement production-grade integrations with external platforms: CRMs, CDPs, measurement vendors, and data partners

 - Own integration projects end-to-end, from scoping through production, with full accountability for outcomes

 - Collaborate directly with external partners to define, validate, and evolve data contracts

Developer Platform

 - Drive the architecture of Vibe's public API: account, advertiser, and campaign management endpoints built to scale

 - Develop documentation, monitoring, and tooling that makes the developer experience genuinely first-class

 - Contribute to MCP gateway and authentication layers that expose Vibe's capabilities to the world

Reliability and Scale

 - Identify architectural weaknesses in existing pipelines and lead the effort to rebuild them for scale

 - Set the standard for code quality on the team. Your reviews move the bar, not just the diff

 - Use AI tooling actively to accelerate development and raise output quality across the team

Team Leadership

 - Mentor junior and mid-level engineers through code review, pairing, and direct feedback

 - Help establish engineering norms and practices as the team scales across two continents

 - Partner with the Engineering Manager on technical direction and hiring calibration
   
   


WHAT YOU NEED

 - Typically 6+ years shipping production backend systems: APIs, data pipelines, and distributed services at scale

 - Deep hands-on proficie

source_jobs.title: Client Experience Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Vibe

At Vibe.co http://Vibe.co, we're reimagining how brands reach audiences in the age of streaming. We believe streaming TV is no longer just a brand awareness play, it's the next great performance marketing channel. We're building the infrastructure to unlock this $100B opportunity.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co provides an Audience First Streaming TV Advertising solution for marketers to unlock TV as a growth channel. Our all-in-one solution combines hyper-targeted audience segmentation, AI-powered insights and recommendations, real-time campaign optimization, and incrementality measurement, giving brands of all sizes the precision and transparency they've come to expect from social and search, but on TV.

Trusted by over 10,000 brands, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co reaches more than 120 million households across 500+ apps and channels, delivering an average 250% return on ad spend and 20% sales lift. The company hit a $100 million revenue run rate in under two years, ranking among the ten fastest software companies to reach that milestone.

Vibe.co http://Vibe.co's investors include Hedosophia (an early backer of Spotify, Uber, and Airbnb), Elaia, Singular, QuantumLight (Revolut CEO Nik Storonsky's fund), and Illusian (Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen's fund), as well as angel investors including Carolyn Everson, board member of The Walt Disney Company and Coca-Cola. Nirav Tolia, CEO of Nextdoor, sits on the company's board of directors.

Founded in 2022, Vibe.co http://Vibe.co is widely recognized as the category-defining platform in streaming TV advertising, bringing the power of Meta and Google-style performance marketing to the fastest-growing segment in media.

About the Role

Vibe is rapidly scaling its events strategy across every format, and client experience is a key lever in that plan. Our next Client Experience Manager owns the VIP layer of that strategy: executive dinners, bespoke client experiences, and standalone activations that sit outside the trade show floor. Reporting to the Director of Events and Experiences, you'll work alongside the teammate who owns trade show logistics and the teammate who owns pipeline and invitee targeting — while you own the experience itself: the venue, the room, the feeling a client walks away with. This role starts execution-focused and grows into building your own event series and VIP strategy independently. Three reasons this is a great next step: you set the standard for what "great" looks like at Vibe, the dinners and activations you run have a direct, visible line to pipeline, and no two weeks look the same.

What You'll Do

Client Entertainment & VIP Experiences

 - Own the full lifecycle of executive dinners, from venue research through on-the-night delivery

 - Build a curated network of venues, restaurants, and private dining contacts across key US markets

 - Match client tier to experience, from an intimate dinner to a full activation, with the Sales team

 - Partner on invitee targeting to get the right guests into the right room

 - Create a client gifting program tailored to relationship stage and account tier

Trade Show & Event Hospitality

 - Design hospitality touch points at trade shows, including booth lounges and hosted happy hours

 - Source F&B, décor, and logistics vendors across multiple destinations at a consistent standard

 - Keep every touchpoint on brand, from the atmosphere down to the smallest detail

 - Coordinate on the logistics handoff so hospitality and operations run in sync

Budget & Vendor Management

 - Track spend against budget across every activation, flagging variances as they emerge

 - Report on ROI after each experience to sharpen the next one

 - Negotiate directly with venues, caterers, and suppliers to protect quality at the best price

 - Build vendor relationships that earn Vibe preferred rates and priority access

What You Need

 - 3–5 years in hospitality, luxury client experience, or event production, with high-end experiences del

notes: High tech role ratio, frequent postings, and a strong focus on engineering and AI roles suggest an engineering-heavy organization.
